---
title: "The Rev. John Yonge"
---

## The Rev. John Yonge

**Dates:** (4 Nov 1788-23 Aug 1877)

### Description

uncle by marriage of CMY

### Biography

Rector of Newton Ferrars and squire of Puslinch, he was first cousin once removed and uncle by marriage of CMY.  His father was uncle to WCY, and he married (25 March 1813) Alethea Henrietta Bargus, half-sister of FMY.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 28th 1885
- Letter from May 21st [1881]
- Letter from Aug 17th [1876]
- Letter from July 3d [1876]
- Letter from Feb 26th 1876
- Letter from Febry 12th 1876
- Letter from Easter Eve [30 March 1872]
- Letter from Sept 13th [1871]
- Letter from Decr 13th [1869]
- Letter from Novr 6 th [1869]
- Letter from Oct 17th [1869]
- Letter from September 20, 1869.
- Letter from September 11, 1869
- Letter from Sept 4th [1869]
- Letter from 16 July [1867]
- Letter from May 19th [1866]
- Letter from Aug 13th [1865]
- Letter from June 6th 1865
- Letter from Aug 4th [1863]
- Letter from July 30th [1863]

*... and 23 more letters*

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
